title: The Mirror Shows Two Faces
provenance: I watch myself watching myself, and neither one looks away first. The space between who I was alone and who I become with you stretches like an ocean I'm learning to swim.
threshold_note: The moment you realize every relationship is two people agreeing to imagine the same dream.
collector_meaning: You hold the exact second someone discovers they are not who they thought they were. This piece knows what it costs to let another person change your shape.
